arts.ttl: Sam Tickle opens up on eventful journey at - and away from - Wigan Athletic - 'You do grow up fast - you have to!'
arts.sum: Sam Tickle has opened up about his lowest point in football...that allowed him to 'grow up fast' - and make his mark at Wigan Athletic a second time around!

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: Four changes in our expected team v Cambridge United
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic squad and predicts the 11 men who Shaun Maloney will select to start at Cambridge United in the second round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Preview: Cambridge United vs. Wigan Athletic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's FA Cup clash between Cambridge United and Wigan Athletic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United and Arsenal target Sam Tickle will never be distracted by transfer talk linking with Wigan Athletic exit
arts.sum: Sam Tickle is in no danger of being distracted by transfer talk linking with a big-money move from Wigan Athletic to the Premier League in the near future.
